metadata.reference: D. I. Yakubovsky, A. V. Arsenin, Y. V. Stebunov, D. Yu. Fedyanin, V. S. Volkov. Optical constants and structural properties of thin gold films. Opt. Express 25, 25574-25587 (2017)
metadata.comments: Au thickness = 25 nm, e-beam evaporated at 1 Å/s with base pressure of 7e-7 Torr on Si wafer at T = 20 °C. Thickness determined by AFM and XRR.
